race.description: Happy 75th Birthday Graeme Sharpe Qtis 2YO Mdn Plate
race.comment: HARRY'S MODE (3) has been gelded since leading for home but dropping off over 1000m at the Gold Coast a fortnight ago. Shows plenty of dash in his races and the recent op may switch him on at both ends of the race. Watch for sharp improvement in a race without a great deal of depth. The one with the most upside is PORTNOVA (10) who closed strongly to get up for second on debut over 1000m at the Gold Coast last start. Poses a big threat over the extra 100m today. Kris Lees' first starter WINNING HARLOW (12) has been to the trials four times and from gate one should give a good account. TRUE INTENT (14) led and was only denied in the final stages over 1200m at Doomben last start. Lining up for only the third time and back to this trip should give backers a sight. First starter BOOM DAGGAR (1) showed a bit more at his latest trial appearance and might be worth monitoring for market confidence.
